market_pulse: EDC Week driving heavy talent bookings across Strip; Omnia Dayclub launching May 15th as new competitive pressure; Tao Beach securing headliners; LIV positioning strong with Tiësto, David Guetta, and dom Dolla this week.

story_activity.summary: EDC Week lineup announced on Instagram (@livlv): Josh Baker B2B Kettama B2B Prospa (Wed 5/13), dom Dolla (Thu 5/14), Tiësto (Fri 5/15), Four Color Zack (Sat 5/16), David Guetta (Mon 5/18)
Daytime roster confirmed on Instagram (@livbeach): Knock2Music (Thu 5/14), Disco Lines (Fri 5/15), David Guetta (Sat 5/16), John Summit (Sun 5/17)
Memorial Day weekend lineups: Zedd (Fri 5/22), Steve Aoki (Sat 5/23), DJ Pauly D (Sun 5/24 into Mon 5/25). New Omnia Dayclub opening May 15.
283K follower account actively posting; Wynn ecosystem integration. No specific EDC week lineups found; potential visibility gap.
